column_description: the unique identifier of the SAR report
the id of the alert that triggered this SAR
the date when the SAR was created internally
the date when the SAR was filed with authorities
value_description:
Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
NULL if not yet filed

column_description: the type of suspicious activity report
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Common types: Initial Report, Continuing Activity Report, Joint Report

commonsense evidence:
Examples: Money Laundering, Terrorist Financing, Fraud, Tax Evasion, Structuring, Identity Theft

column_description: the total monetary amount involved in the suspicious activity
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
The cumulative amount of all transactions related to this suspicious activity, in base currency.

column_description: the compliance officer who filed the report
value_description: Name or ID of the officer responsible for filing

column_description: the reference number assigned by Financial Intelligence Unit
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
The unique identifier assigned by the regulatory authority upon receipt of the SAR. NULL if not yet acknowledged.
